name: "Barrage" (COD)
description:
You caught his eye, is it a good thing?

I saw the hype and figured I'd give it a try! My page is known for it's cod Characters and I'd be quite dumb not to try it out! This is my interpretation of the character! If you want another version, leave me a comment!

Setting is America, forest area in the Grand Canyon, and near a waterfall in a large manor like cabin. (I'll leave the rest up to you all!)

Please enjoy!♡♡
creator: Hell's daughter
